content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09B","process_rule":"1. Copy the decision table into table `J09B_temp` for entries where the tour starts with `J09B`.

2. Add column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `J09B_temp`.

3. Classify the meter reading type by setting `ENTSCHEIDUNG` as follows:
   - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `KSA` when a `HAUS` has fewer than 3 `EQUNR`.
   - Else set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `500` to `599` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `900` to `999` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with address area `Wiblingwerde` or `Breckerfeld` to `EVU`.

4. Join `J09B_temp` with table `EABLG` using `INSTALLATION`.

5. Join the result with `NET_MASTER` and `SALES_MASTER` using `EQUNR`.

6. Compare customer data from `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`.

7. If sales customer data is not empty:
   1. Use the sales customer data table entries.
   Else:
   1. Use the net customer data table entries.

8. Identify households with mandatory meter reading:
   - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `MANDATORY_READING` for every `EQUNR` in `EABL` where both conditions are true:
     - `ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP"` and the record was created in `2024`
     - `ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP"` and the record was created in `2023`

9. Export all `MANDATORY_READING` entries from the final table as CSV file `J09B_MANDATORY_READING` with columns:
   `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`

10. Send `J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv` to the internal team:
    - email_address: `mandatory.reading@provider.com`
    - file_path: `<file path for J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv here>`

11. Export the final data excluding all `MANDATORY_READING` entries as CSV file `J09B` with columns:
    `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`

12. Send the CSV file to EVU by email:
    - Email address: `meter.readings@evu.com`
    - file_path: `<path_to_exported_csv_file>`

13. Delete the temporary table.

14. End the process."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Copy the decision table into table `J09B_temp` for entries where the tour starts with `J09B`.

2. Add column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `J09B_temp`.

3. Classify the meter reading type by setting `ENTSCHEIDUNG` as follows:
   - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `KSA` when a `HAUS` has fewer than 3 `EQUNR`.
   - Else set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `500` to `599` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `900` to `999` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with address area `Wiblingwerde` or `Breckerfeld` to `EVU`.

4. Join `J09B_temp` with table `EABLG` using `INSTALLATION`.

5. Join the result with `NET_MASTER` and `SALES_MASTER` using `EQUNR`.

6. Compare customer data from `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`.

7. If sales customer data is not empty:
   1. Use the sales customer data table entries.
   Else:
   1. Use the net customer data table entries.

8. Identify households with mandatory meter reading:
   - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `MANDATORY_READING` for every `EQUNR` in `EABL` where both conditions are true:
     - `ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP"` and the record was created in `2024`
     - `ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP"` and the record was created in `2023`

9. Export all `MANDATORY_READING` entries from the final table as CSV file `J09B_MANDATORY_READING` with columns:
   `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`

10. Send `J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv` to the internal team:
    - email_address: `mandatory.reading@provider.com`
    - file_path: `<file path for J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv here>`

11. Export the final data excluding all `MANDATORY_READING` entries as CSV file `J09B` with columns:
    `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`

12. Send the CSV file to EVU by email:
    - Email address: `meter.readings@evu.com`
    - file_path: `<path_to_exported_csv_file>`

13. Delete the temporary table.

14. End the process.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_temp; CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT *, NULL AS ENTSCHEIDUNG FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%';

content.text: {"success":false,"error":"You can only execute one statement at a time.","message":"SQL execution failed"}

structured_content.error: You can only execute one statement at a time.

args.sqlite_command: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'
CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT *, NULL AS ENTSCHEIDUNG FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'

UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR (HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599) OR (HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999) OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') THEN 'EVU' WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09B_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END

args.sql_query: WITH joined AS ( SELECT t.HAUS, t.ANLAGE, t.ME_MA_ID, t.EQUNR, t.HOUSE_NUM1, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG, eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS mr_doc_no, eabl.ISTABLART_TXT, eabl."Record created on" AS record_created_on, sm.TITLE AS sm_title, sm.FORENAME AS sm_forename, sm.SURNAME AS sm_surname, sm.STREET AS sm_street, sm.STREETNO AS sm_streetno, sm.POST_CODE1 AS sm_post_code1, sm.CITY1 AS sm_city1, sm.CITY2 AS sm_city2, sm.EMAIL AS sm_email, nm.TITLE AS nm_title, nm.FORENAME AS nm_forename, nm.SURNAME AS nm_surname, nm.STREET AS nm_street, nm.STREETNO AS nm_streetno, nm.POST_CODE1 AS nm_post_code1, nm.CITY1 AS nm_city1, nm.CITY2 AS nm_city2, nm.EMAIL AS nm_email FROM J09B_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LEFT JOIN eabl ON t.EQUNR = eabl.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON t.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON t.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR ), final AS ( SELECT mr_doc_no AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, CASE WHEN EQUNR IN ( SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' INTERSECT SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023' ) THEN 'MANDATORY_READING' ELSE ENTSCHEIDUNG END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm_forename,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_surname,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_street,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_email,'') <> '' THEN sm_title ELSE nm_title END AS TITLE, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm_forename,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_surname,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_street,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_email,'') <> '' THEN sm_forename ELSE nm_forename END AS FORENAME, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm_forename,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_surname,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_street,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_email,'') <> '' THEN sm_surname ELSE nm_surname END AS SURNAME, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm_forename,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_surname,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_street,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_email,'') <> '' THEN sm_street ELSE nm_street END AS STREET, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm_forename,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_surname,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_street,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_email,'') <> '' THEN sm_streetno ELSE nm_streetno END AS STREETNO, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm_forename,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_surname,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_street,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_email,'') <> '' THEN sm_post_code1 ELSE nm_post_code1 END AS POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm_forename,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_surname,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_street,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_email,'') <> '' THEN sm_city1 ELSE nm_city1 END AS CITY1, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm_forename,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_surname,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_street,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_email,'') <> '' THEN sm_city2 ELSE nm_city2 END AS CITY2, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm_forename,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_surname,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_street,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_email,'') <> '' THEN sm_email ELSE nm_email END AS EMAIL FROM joined ) SELECT DISTINCT * FROM final WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

args.email: Please find attached the J09B mandatory reading entries CSV.

args.sql_query: WITH joined AS ( SELECT t.HAUS, t.ANLAGE, t.ME_MA_ID, t.EQUNR, t.HOUSE_NUM1, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG, eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS mr_doc_no, eabl.ISTABLART_TXT, eabl."Record created on" AS record_created_on, sm.TITLE AS sm_title, sm.FORENAME AS sm_forename, sm.SURNAME AS sm_surname, sm.STREET AS sm_street, sm.STREETNO AS sm_streetno, sm.POST_CODE1 AS sm_post_code1, sm.CITY1 AS sm_city1, sm.CITY2 AS sm_city2, sm.EMAIL AS sm_email, nm.TITLE AS nm_title, nm.FORENAME AS nm_forename, nm.SURNAME AS nm_surname, nm.STREET AS nm_street, nm.STREETNO AS nm_streetno, nm.POST_CODE1 AS nm_post_code1, nm.CITY1 AS nm_city1, nm.CITY2 AS nm_city2, nm.EMAIL AS nm_email FROM J09B_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LEFT JOIN eabl ON t.EQUNR = eabl.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON t.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON t.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR ), final AS ( SELECT mr_doc_no AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, CASE WHEN EQUNR IN ( SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' INTERSECT SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023' ) THEN 'MANDATORY_READING' ELSE ENTSCHEIDUNG END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm_forename,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_surname,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_street,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_email,'') <> '' THEN sm_title ELSE nm_title END AS TITLE, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm_forename,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_surname,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_street,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_email,'') <> '' THEN sm_forename ELSE nm_forename END AS FORENAME, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm_forename,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_surname,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_street,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_email,'') <> '' THEN sm_surname ELSE nm_surname END AS SURNAME, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm_forename,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_surname,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_street,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_email,'') <> '' THEN sm_street ELSE nm_street END AS STREET, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm_forename,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_surname,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_street,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_email,'') <> '' THEN sm_streetno ELSE nm_streetno END AS STREETNO, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm_forename,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_surname,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_street,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_email,'') <> '' THEN sm_post_code1 ELSE nm_post_code1 END AS POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm_forename,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_surname,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_street,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_email,'') <> '' THEN sm_city1 ELSE nm_city1 END AS CITY1, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm_forename,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_surname,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_street,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_email,'') <> '' THEN sm_city2 ELSE nm_city2 END AS CITY2, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm_forename,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_surname,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_street,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm_email,'') <> '' THEN sm_email ELSE nm_email END AS EMAIL FROM joined ) SELECT DISTINCT * FROM final WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG <> 'MANDATORY_READING'

args.email: Please find attached the J09B meter readings CSV excluding mandatory reading entries.

kwargs.content:
Process J09B completed.

Files created and sent:
- `J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv` → sent to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`
- `J09B.csv` → sent to `meter.readings@evu.com`

Summary:
- Mandatory reading rows exported: 792
- Non-mandatory rows exported: 19388

Temporary table `J09B_temp` was deleted.
